data.title: Walmart begins accepting CareCredit cards for health and wellness purchases
data.description: The expanded Walmart and Synchrony collaboration features CareCredit cards that consumers can use for payments online and in physical stores.

data.title: American Express launches developer kit, purchase protection for agentic commerce
data.description: The developer kit "focuses on trust, control and visibility when transactions are initiated by an agent and highlights the underlying payments infrastructure necessary around authentication and intent," according to American Express.

data.title: FedEx CFO to step down in June
data.description: The news ties into when the company expects to complete its spin-off of FedEx Freight into a new publicly traded company, on June 1, 2026.

data.title: Salesforce shares approach toward integration with OpenAI's ChatGPT
data.description: An executive at Salesforce told Digital Commerce 360 that Salesforce will work with partners such as Perplexity, Anthropic's Claude or Gemini "to deliver agentic commerce as far as they are willing."

data.title: TD SYNNEX Q1 revenue surpasses expectations
data.description: The distribution section of the business grew by 17% to $22 billion, TD SYNNEX told investors on its quarterly earnings call.
